author: B. Gavanti († 1638), C. Merati († l744), M. Quarti († after 1650), J. Bona († 1674), and J. Catalani († 1764)
title: Mystica expositio missae (Thesaurus sac. rit, Pars II, tit. XVI)
remarks: He cites all sources, draws from the whole tradition: Florus, Alcuin, Germanus, Rupert, Honorius, Hugo, Stephen of Liege, Alexander, Innocent, Micrologus, Durandus, Aquinas, Radulph, Melchior, Titelman, Biel, Princess Maria, etc.
